name: GBG
description: GBG provides identity verification, document authentication and fraud prevention services across many geographies through its ID3global and identity proofing APIs used by banks, retailers and government bodies.

seo.title: GBG — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: GBG: GBG provides identity verification, document authentication and fraud prevention services across many geographies through its ID3global and identity proofi

when_to_use: Global identity verification API across 70+ countries
Document authentication for bank account opening
Fraud prevention scoring for e-commerce onboarding
Address verification enrichment for credit risk assessment
KYC API integration for government identity programs

pros: ID3global covers many geographies out of the box
Trusted by banks, retail and government buyers
Public company with stable enterprise track record
cons: Legacy stack, slower to ship modern API changes
Integration onboarding is sales-led and slow
UI and dashboards feel dated vs newer vendors
Pricing tuned for enterprise, not startup-friendly
review.verdict: Mature multi-country IDV stack, a safe enterprise pick if you can tolerate legacy DX and sales cycles.
review.best_for: Banks, retailers and government agencies needing multi-country identity proofing with vendor stability
review.not_for: Startups wanting self-serve signup, modern SDKs and fast iteration on onboarding flows

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
